name: Fettuccine W/Gorgonzola Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 medium red bell pepper, seeded, cut in short strips
1 can (15 oz.) artichoke hearts, drained and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fettuccine according to package directions. Drain and place in a warm bowl.
2. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add asparagus, leeks, pepper, and garlic. Cook and stir for 5-7 minutes or until asparagus is crisp-tender.
3. Add artichoke hearts and tomatoes to the skillet. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until hot.
4. Add the cooked fettuccine to the skillet with vegetables.
5. Prepare Gorgonzola Sauce and pour it over the fettuccine and veggies. Toss everything together.
6. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese. Garnish with additional cherry tomatoes if desired.
7. Serve with extra Parmesan cheese on top.
